name: Brass Fittings
description: Precision-engineered brass fittings for reliable pipe connections in plumbing, pneumatic, and hydraulic systems. Available in BSP and NPT thread standards.

name: Brass Valves
description: High-performance brass valves for flow control, isolation, and pressure regulation in industrial and commercial applications.

name: Brass Connectors
description: Versatile brass connectors for joining pipes, hoses, and tubes across pneumatic, hydraulic, and fluid-transfer systems.

name: Brass Fasteners
description: Corrosion-resistant brass fasteners including bolts, nuts, screws, and washers for electrical, marine, and general assembly applications.

name: Brass Inserts
description: Threaded brass inserts for plastic molding, providing durable metal threads in injection-molded, 3D-printed, and thermoformed components.

name: Turned Parts
description: CNC-turned brass components including shafts, standoffs, pins, and bushings manufactured to tight tolerances for diverse industrial applications.

name: Plumbing Components
description: Premium brass plumbing components for residential and commercial installations including valves, traps, drains, and faucet parts.

name: Electrical Components
description: High-conductivity brass electrical components including cable glands, terminals, earthing accessories, and switchgear contacts.
